signals.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Advance Toward New Round Before Expiration | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Advance Toward New Round Before Expiration | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Bloomberg reports sources confirming the US and Iran are discussing face-to-face negotiations before the current ceasefire expires next week, with Trump noting Iran reached out on a deal; this has driven market rallies as oil drops and S&P 500 surges on peace prospects[1][2].

signals.headline: Ethereum Price Surge to $6K Amid Pectra Upgrade Final Testing and Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence** [3]
signals.raw:
Ethereum Price Surge to $6K Amid Pectra Upgrade Final Testing and Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence** [3]

As of April 18, 2026, Ethereum has hit $6K, driven by a massive surge in institutional demand, Spot Ethereum ETF inflows at all-time highs, and the Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade entering its final testing phase, which promises wallet abstraction and validator efficiency improvement
